title: Gauravaram Heat Wave
lead: Gauravaram is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.66. The city has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Gauravaram is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 15.3 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 41%, and the wind speed is 7.0 km/h, which is not providing any significant relief. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, but the CDD is significantly high, leading to a critical heat wave situation.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the heat wave's impact.
